title: Marcel Design System from Carrefour
content: Marcel from Directories: Components: Marcel is Carrefour’s design system, designed to unify digital experiences across its platforms and services. As a single source of truth for Carrefour’s digital identity, Marcel helps teams create seamless customer experiences—whether shopping online, using the mobile app, or engaging with in-store digital touchpoints. Marcel also enables teams to build user-friendly interfaces across international markets while maintaining Carrefour’s brand identity.
